title: Developing the RVGI, CCI and SMA Confluence Engine
verdict: MEDIUM EXTRACT - RVGI formula (4-bar weighted body/range ratio with smoothing), 3-layer confluence (SMA trend + CCI return from extreme + RVGI cross), ATR SL with 2-target TP.

bullish: RVGI main crosses above signal line
bearish: RVGI main crosses below signal line

keep: RVGI formula: weighted body/range ratio with 4-bar lookback
2-target TP: ATR*1.0 (P1) and ATR*2.0 (P2) validates our P1/P2 architecture
discard: CCI crossing ±100 as entry gate (too slow for M1)
improve: RVGI as supplement to EMA3: RVGI crossing zero = momentum confirmation at zone
Use RVGI main vs signal cross alongside our EMA3 cross for dual momentum confirmation
TP1=ATR*1 and TP2=ATR*2 validates our partial close architecture
